content: Enchanted Roads reduce the movement cost for units.  They are an improvement on <L:DATABASE_TILE_IMPROVEMENTS,TILEIMP_ROAD>Roads<e>, and allow units to travel greater distances in a single turn.  Build them on any land tile.

find: Magnetic Levitation Trains, or <L:DATABASE_TILE_IMPROVEMENTS,TILEIMP_MAGLEV>Maglevs<e>, are transit systems that whiz along the surface of the earth at speeds well in excess of any other form of land transportation.  As a <L:DATABASE_CONCEPTS,CONCEPT_TILE_IMPROVEMENTS>Tile Improvement<e>, they are the fastest way to get around, dramatically reducing the movement costs associated with any terrain they are built on.
